title: sasaella exsaniosa
side_effects: Sasaella exsaniosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling, as well as gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to liver and kidney damage. In rare cases, excessive consumption may cause hallucinations, seizures, and even coma. If you're considering using Sasaella exsaniosa, it's essential to consult with a medical professional to ensure safe and proper use.
